chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 574 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2848/2014 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2849/2014 17.09.2025 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon advocate holds brief for Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2014 without any significant progress. Even today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. This reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
